name: College Greenlight / Scholarship America
amount: Varies by program; College Greenlight platform connects students with scholarship matches; awards vary $500–$10,000+

eligibility.citizenship: U.S. citizen, permanent resident, or DACA; eligibility varies by specific scholarship
eligibility.other_requirements: College Greenlight is a platform that helps first-generation and underrepresented students identify scholarship matches; scholarship criteria vary by specific program

deadline: Ongoing; varies by specific scholarship match
stackable_notes: External platform-matched scholarships generally stack with institutional aid. Check each matched award individually.
notes: College Greenlight (now part of Scholarship America ecosystem) is a free platform, not a single scholarship. It helps first-gen and underrepresented students identify and track scholarships. Advisors can recommend students create profiles to get personalized scholarship matches. The value is in the matching technology and comprehensive database, not a single cash award.
